message:
feat(bench): add comprehensive protocol benchmark suite

Add protocol_benchmark.rs with benchmarks for:
- HTTP/1.1 request parsing (simple GET, POST with body, varying headers)
- HPACK encoding/decoding (request/response headers, dynamic table)
- WebSocket frame parsing (masked/unmasked, varying payload sizes)
- Throughput benchmarks for protocol operations

Part of bd-inmb benchmark suite work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,8 @@ cli = ["dep:clap", "dep:time", "trace-compression", "dep:conformance"]
 sqlite = ["dep:rusqlite"]
 # Enable PostgreSQL async client with wire protocol.
 postgres = ["dep:sha2"]
+# Enable MySQL async client with wire protocol.
+mysql = ["dep:sha2"]
 # Enable QUIC protocol support via quinn.
 quic = ["dep:quinn", "tls"]
 
@@ -145,6 +147,14 @@ harness = false
 name = "reactor_benchmark"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "protocol_benchmark"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "tracing_overhead"
+harness = false
+
 [lints.rust]
 # Default to deny for unsafe code - specific modules that require it can use #[allow(unsafe_code)]
 # The epoll reactor requires unsafe for the polling crate's FFI operations
